incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Count by 5s until you reach 25.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on second attempt

params.description: Monkey Bars row highlights in data table.

steps.text: Look at the data table. Monkey Bars has 25. Count by 5s: how many 5s make 25? Each symbol equals 5.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System demonstrates counting by 5s: symbols appear one at a time with labels 5, 10, 15, 20, 25 appearing sequentially.

steps.text: Let me show you. Count by 5s: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25. That's 5 groups of 5. When each symbol equals 5, you need 5 symbols to show 25. The answer is 5 symbols.
